title: The Problem-Solving Spectrum: From Rules to Learning
description: A flowchart contrasting traditional programming with machine learning and highlighting the specific advantages of deep learning for complex, unstructured data.
relationships: Traditional Programming uses explicit rules on data to get an output, but struggles with complex problems like image recognition. Classic Machine Learning requires manually engineered features from the data as an intermediate step. Deep Learning automates feature extraction by learning multiple layers of representations directly from the raw data, making it superior for complex, high-dimensional problems.
